text.title: Router Shadow Deploy — Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure: wire traffic mirror → calibrate judge → run ≥7-day shadow window → aggregate report → gradual rollout → cut-over with rollback ready.

step.name: wire-traffic-mirror
step.input: Production gateway config, candidate router container, traffic-mirror sidecar OR gateway feature
step.action: Configure 100% traffic mirror from production router to candidate. Verify the candidate's response NEVER reaches the user (return-to-user path stays on production). Log per-request: prod_response, candidate_response, prod_cost_cents, candidate_cost_cents, prod_schema_hash, candidate_schema_hash.
step.output: Mirror live; shadow-log table receiving rows
step.decision-gate: If any 0.1% of candidate responses leak to users — STOP; rollback the mirror config (r1-zero-user-impact).

step.name: calibrate-judge
step.action: Run both prod and candidate against labelled set, compute LLM-judge scores. Pin judge model + prompt version in `shadow-report.yaml`. Require ≥0.85 agreement between judge and SME before trusting the shadow signal.
step.decision-gate: If judge agreement <0.85 — fix prompt or pick another judge; shadow with uncalibrated judge is noise.

step.name: run-shadow-window
step.action: Run ≥7 calendar days of shadow. Daily: compute scoring-delta (candidate vs prod judge mean), cost-delta (candidate cost / prod cost), schema-parity (% identical schema hashes).
step.decision-gate: If schema-parity drops <100% — STOP shadow; schema sneak-change is a fix-before-promote item (r4-schema-parity-100).

step.name: aggregate-shadow-report
step.action: Compute window aggregates: median scoring-delta + 95% CI, mean cost-delta, min-schema-parity across days. Cite acceptance-contract thresholds.
step.decision-gate: If sustained window <7 days — extend; short windows give noisy means (r5-sustained-window-min).

step.name: gradual-rollout
step.action: Route 1% real traffic to candidate; monitor user-visible metrics for 24h. If clean: 10%, 50%, 100% over 5 days. At each step verify online metrics from acceptance contract stay in band.
step.output: Candidate at 100% with rollback flag still wired
step.decision-gate: If any user-visible metric breaches at any step — pause rollout; rollback to last good percentage; investigate.

step.name: cut-over
step.action: Decommission old router code path. Archive shadow-report.yaml in audit log. Keep the rollback runbook reachable for 30 days.
step.decision-gate: If post-cut-over regression suspected — execute rollback within 15min using `templates/rollback-runbook.md`.
